$schema_note: Phase 3 — Grades, Clearance, Laboratory Borrowing. module-registry.json only defines these at summary level, so this file is intentionally shallow. Expand each work package to the same depth as the Phase 1 files (02-08) when Phase 3 is actually scheduled.

work_packages.name: Grades
work_packages.goal: Grade encoding, viewing, and term summaries.

stub_tasks.title: Expand into full WBS (grading scheme, encoding workflow + deadlines, faculty encoding UI, student viewing UI, term summary computation)
stub_tasks.risk: Grades are often institutionally sensitive/regulated data — confirm whether this even belongs in the portal vs. staying in a registrar system before building.

open_questions: Does OSAS already own grades, making this a sync/display module rather than a source-of-truth encoding module?
What grading scale (numeric, letter, GWA computation rules)?
Grade change/appeal workflow — similar to attendance corrections?

work_packages.name: Clearance

stub_tasks.title: Expand into full WBS (signatory roles/routing, per-signatory approve/hold, student clearance-status dashboard)

open_questions: Who are the signatories (department admin, librarian, cashier, adviser) and are they all portal users or external offices?
Is clearance tied to attendance thresholds from this system?

work_packages.name: Laboratory Borrowing

stub_tasks.title: Expand into full WBS (inventory schema, borrow/return workflow, overdue/accountability tracking, QR/barcode tagging of equipment)

open_questions: Does equipment get its own QR/barcode (reusing the QR infra from P1.QR)?
Fines/penalties for late/damaged returns — in scope or out?
